E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

DCDC_48V_V1.1

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DADDF1
Recv ID: 18DAF1DD
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: DD
Func Name: Superviseur-DCDC_29b

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "12",
    "supplier": "LS Automotive",
    "soft": "SW APP",
    "version": "A.02"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "12",
    "supplier": "LS Automotive",
    "soft": "SW APP",
    "version": "B.00"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 6816,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Circuit voltage below threshold - MV"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6817,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Component Failures"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6818,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Circuit voltage below threshold - LV"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6819,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Component or system over temperature"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6827,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Performance or Incorrect Operation - DTC_class_B"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6828,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Performance or Incorrect Operation -DTC_class_C"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6829,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Performance or Incorrect Operation -DTC_class_D"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6832,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Precharge during mission"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6833,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "DCDC Off vehicule running"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6834,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Reset DCDC"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6835,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "DCDC is in Direct mode, the CAN off and the MV voltage is in the right range"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6836,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "DCDC refuses to go to sleep and sleep command is sent"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6837,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "FOTA DTC overflow"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6838,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Short circuit 48V side (unable to perform the precharge)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6839,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Undervoltage LV side < VL1_LV_mini (during reverse or precharge mode)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6840,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Overvoltage LV side > 35V (all operation mode)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6842,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Reverse current LV side exceeding the allowed timing (all operation mode)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6843,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Lvcurrent > DCDC_12Vcurrentlimitation +10% (during reverse/Precharge mode)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6844,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Overvoltage HV side > 70V"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6845,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Undervoltage HV side <28V (during reverse mode)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6846,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "PCU Overcurrent current >= 70A (during Direct mode)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6847,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "PCU Overcurrent current >= 40A (during Reverse mode)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6848,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Short circuit of HV safety switch (in standby mode)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6849,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Short circuit of LV safety switch (in standby mode)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6850,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Open circuit on the GND connection"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6820,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN component Failures"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 57664,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN communication failure with ECM"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 57779,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN communication failure with BMS"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 59905,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Bus off"
  }
]

    "deny_sds": [],

      "Temperature measurements.Internal temperature 1 measurement": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true,
